hooks.command:
git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^plugins/' && printf '{"systemMessage":"!!! REMINDER: Plugin files modified — run ./force-reinstall.sh to activate changes."}
' || true

args:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in dist/*|*/dist/*) printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"dist/ is a build artifact directory - edit sources under plugins/ instead."}
';; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: Checking file is not in dist/

hooks.prompt: Check $ARGUMENTS. If tool_input.file_path starts with 'dist/' or contains '/dist/', respond {"ok": false, "reason": "dist/ is a build artifact directory - edit sources under plugins/ instead."}. Otherwise respond {"ok": true}.
